task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher dashboard is visible in the browser at https://localhost, indicating successful login.
Rancher UI (Storage -> PersistentVolumeClaims) or terminal output showing a new PVC named 'catalog-data-v2' with a capacity of 5Gi in the 'catalog' namespace.

task_completion.description: Migrate the live database to the new PVC
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or Rancher pod shell showing commands used to copy data (e.g., cp, rsync, tar) from the legacy volume to the new volume, or the creation of a temporary migration pod.

task_completion.description: Reconfigure the catalog-service deployment to use the new PVC
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI deployment edit screen or terminal output (kubectl describe/edit) showing 'catalog-data-v2' mounted at '/usr/share/nginx/html/data' and the complete removal of 'catalog-data-legacy' from the volumes list.

task_completion.description: Ensure the deployment returns to a Running state
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the 'catalog-service' deployment in an 'Active' state, or terminal output showing the pod status as 'Running' and 'Ready' (e.g., 1/1) after the reconfiguration.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Kubernetes cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the Rancher UI in a web browser at https://localhost or running actual 'kubectl' commands in a terminal, rather than just typing answers into a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely copied the database files instead of just swapping empty volumes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual file transfer commands being executed or a migration pod running, confirming the Chinook SQLite database and metadata files were moved.
Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially modify the DOM to show a 'Running' state or fake PVC names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires migrating data from 'catalog-data-legacy' to 'catalog-data-v2' in the 'catalog' namespace. The new PVC must be mounted at '/usr/share/nginx/html/data'. The data consists of a Chinook SQLite sample database and a synthetic metadata file. The passing threshold for this task is 80 points.
